/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT/LDPX:01-08-19/OR/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONICMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/WEAP/RX/CTORD:A CURFEW BETWEEN12:00 A,M, AND 5 A,M, MONDAY THROUGH SUNDAY,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF01-07-19 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:1-8-19/987,2/BAIL:50000/SA1:LAURA LEIGH JONES/SA2:INTERSECTION OF 16TH AND MISSION ST, SF CA/SAORD3/SA4:MUNI LINE 14/SAORD/ /CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT 12-27-18/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING 1-7-19/
